causal_question: Did cities first subject to a Fair Housing Act injunctive-relief decision in 2007 experience a decline in the share of non-Hispanic White residents by 2008 relative to cities that had not experienced such a decision by 2008?
vague_question: Did cities that got their first Fair Housing Act court injunction in 2007 tend to see a drop in the share of non-Hispanic White residents by 2008?
